center.name: 沃爾夫島
center.summary: 沃爾夫島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Galapagos flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Galapagos flycatcher is found on all of the Galápagos Islands except Darwin, Wolf, and Genovesa. There are, however, single late nineteenth or early twentieth century records from each of them. It inhabits all of the vegetated habitats on the islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Galapagos flycatcher is found on all of the Galápagos Islands except Darwin, Wolf, and Genovesa. There are, however, single late nineteenth or early twentieth century records from each of them. It inhabits all of the vegetated habitats on the islands
